info.title: Bandjacks API
info.description:
## Cyber Threat Defense World Modeling API
    
    Bandjacks provides comprehensive cyber threat intelligence operations including:
    
    - **ATT&CK Data Management**: Load and manage MITRE ATT&CK releases
    - **Natural Language Search**: Hybrid vector and graph search for CTI
    - **Graph Exploration**: Traverse and analyze threat relationships
    - **Document Extraction**: Extract CTI entities from documents using LLMs
    - **Review Workflows**: Human-in-the-loop validation and feedback
    - **Defense Recommendations**: D3FEND integration (coming in Sprint 4)
    
    ### Key Features
    
    - STIX 2.1 compliant data model
    - ADM (ATT&CK Data Model) validation
    - Hybrid search with vector embeddings and graph patterns
    - LLM-powered extraction with evidence grounding
    - Review queue for candidate validation
    - Performance optimized with caching and connection pooling
    
    ### Authentication
    
    Currently no authentication required (development mode).
    Production deployments should implement appropriate authentication.
    
    ### Rate Limiting
    
    No rate limiting currently implemented.
    Production deployments should add rate limiting.

schema.title: Response Get Attack Releases V1 Catalog Attack Releases Get

get.description:
Get list of all ATT&CK tactics with their IDs and names.

Returns:
    List of tactics with stix_id, shortname, and name

schema.title: Response Get Tactics V1 Catalog Tactics Get

post.description:
Ingest a user-supplied STIX bundle.

This endpoint accepts bundles generated by the mapper or manually created,
validates them, and upserts to the graph and vector stores.
Search for ATT&CK techniques/entities similar to input text with optional kb_type filtering.

Analyze document and propose ATT&CK mappings.

Takes a document (via URL or inline text), extracts text,
chunks it, and proposes ATT&CK techniques, groups, software,
and relationships based on the content.

Record analyst decision on a proposed mapping.

This endpoint is called when an analyst reviews a mapping proposal
and decides to accept, edit, or reject it.

Record analyst decision on an existing object.

This endpoint is used for reviewing objects already in the graph,
such as those loaded from ATT&CK or previous mappings.

get.description:
Retrieve a STIX object with provenance and relationships.

This endpoint fetches an object from the graph along with its
source provenance and any relationships it participates in.

post.description:
Extract TTP claims from document using LLM with tool grounding.

This endpoint uses an LLM to analyze the document and extract:
- ATT&CK technique mappings with confidence scores
- Evidence spans showing where claims are supported
- Threat actor and malware identifications
- Relationships between entities

All mappings are grounded through tool calls to the Bandjacks KB.

Convert LLM extraction output to STIX bundle.

This endpoint:
- Converts LLM claims to STIX objects
- Validates all STIX IDs against the KB
- Applies safeguards to cap confidence
- Removes any hallucinated/invalid IDs

Extract CTI from a report with full provenance tracking.

This endpoint:
1. Registers the source document with hash-based ID
2. Chunks the text for processing
3. Extracts entities and relationships using LLM
4. Resolves entities to existing KB entries
5. Builds STIX 2.1 bundle with provenance
6. Optionally ingests to Neo4j graph

get.description:
Get complete provenance history for a STIX object.

This traces the object back through all extraction sources.

schema.title: Response Get Object Provenance V1 Extract Provenance  Object Id  Get

post.description:
Perform natural language search for cyber threat intelligence.
    
    This endpoint implements hybrid search combining:
    - **Vector similarity search** in OpenSearch for semantic matching
    - **Graph pattern matching** in Neo4j for structural relationships
    - **Reciprocal rank fusion** to combine and rank results
    - **Graph context enrichment** with neighboring nodes
    
    The search automatically expands queries with synonyms and related terms
    for improved recall.
Get query expansion with synonyms and related terms for improved search.
Get autocomplete suggestions based on partial query input.

schema.title: Response Query Suggestions V1 Query Suggest Post

get.description:
Get recent query history.

Returns recent queries with their results for analysis
and quick re-execution.

schema.title: Response Query History V1 Query History Get

post.description:
Save a query and its results for future analysis.

This helps build query patterns and improve search over time.

schema.title: Response Save Query V1 Query Save Post

post.description:
Build an attack flow subgraph centered on a technique.
    
    Returns a graph containing:
    - **Center technique** with its properties
    - **Tactics** linked via HAS_TACTIC relationships
    - **Threat groups** that use the technique (optional)
    - **Software/tools** that implement it (optional)
    - **Mitigations** that counter it (optional)
    - **Related techniques** within the specified depth
    
    The graph can be used for visualization or further analysis.

get.description:
Get immediate neighbors of a node.

Returns all nodes connected to the specified node with their relationships.

schema.title: Response Get Node Neighbors V1 Graph Neighbors  Node Id  Get

post.description:
Find shortest path between two nodes.

Returns the shortest path(s) between source and target nodes.

schema.title: Response Find Path V1 Graph Path Post

post.description:
Extract a subgraph containing specified nodes.

Returns all specified nodes and optionally their relationships
and expanded neighborhood.

Submit relevance feedback for search results.
    
    This feedback is used to:
    - Improve search ranking algorithms
    - Learn query patterns and user preferences
    - Identify gaps in the knowledge base
    - Train machine learning models for better matching
    
    Feedback is stored and aggregated for continuous improvement.

Submit a correction for an object or relationship.

Corrections require review before being applied to maintain
data quality and audit trail.

Submit validation feedback for extracted entities.

This is used to approve or reject candidates from extraction
before they are merged into the main knowledge graph.

get.description:
Get pending feedback items that need review or action.

Returns corrections pending review and other actionable feedback.

schema.title: Response Get Pending Feedback V1 Feedback Pending Get

post.description:
Apply approved feedback (corrections).

This actually modifies the knowledge graph based on the feedback.
Requires appropriate permissions.

schema.title: Response Apply Feedback V1 Feedback  Feedback Id  Apply Post

get.description: Get feedback statistics for monitoring and analysis.

schema.title: Response Get Feedback Statistics V1 Feedback Statistics Get

get.description:
Get candidates from the review queue.

Returns a list of candidate nodes pending review, with optional filters.

schema.title: Response Get Review Queue V1 Review Queue Queue Get

get.description:
Get a specific candidate by ID.

Returns detailed information about a candidate node.

post.description:
Approve a candidate and optionally merge to main graph.

This marks the candidate as approved and can automatically merge it
into the main knowledge graph as a proper entity.

schema.title: Response Approve Candidate V1 Review Queue Approve  Candidate Id  Post

post.description:
Reject a candidate with a reason.

This marks the candidate as rejected and moves it to the archive.

schema.title: Response Reject Candidate V1 Review Queue Reject  Candidate Id  Post

post.description:
Approve multiple candidates in batch.

Efficient batch operation for approving multiple candidates at once.

schema.title: Response Batch Approve V1 Review Queue Batch Approve Post

put.description:
Update the status of a candidate.

Allows changing the workflow state of a candidate without full approval/rejection.

schema.title: Response Update Candidate Status V1 Review Queue Status  Candidate Id  Put

get.description:
Get review queue statistics.

Returns aggregate statistics about the review queue including
counts by status, type, and confidence levels.

post.description:
Create candidate nodes from an extraction bundle.

This is called by the extraction pipeline to submit candidates
for review before merging into the main graph.

schema.title: Response Create Candidates From Extraction V1 Review Queue From Extraction Post

delete.description:
Archive old candidates to keep the queue manageable.

Moves old candidates to an archive status based on age and status.

schema.title: Response Archive Old Candidates V1 Review Queue Archive Old Delete

merge_to_graph.title: Merge To Graph
merge_to_graph.description: Whether to merge to main graph

technique_id.title: Technique Id
technique_id.description: STIX ID of the center technique

merge_to_graph.title: Merge To Graph
merge_to_graph.description: Whether to merge to main graph

CorrectionFeedback.title: CorrectionFeedback
CorrectionFeedback.description: Correction feedback for objects or relationships.

source_type.title: Source Type
source_type.description: Type of source (report, blog, pdf, etc)

auto_ingest.title: Auto Ingest
auto_ingest.description: Automatically ingest to graph if True

QueryResponse.title: QueryResponse
QueryResponse.description: Query response with results and metadata.

ReviewDecision.title: ReviewDecision
ReviewDecision.description: Review decision for mapping or object.

tags.name: query
tags.description: Natural language query and hybrid search

tags.name: extract
tags.description: Document extraction and CTI entity recognition
